reason: Four spec-conformance defects: (1) `--url` in SkillRegistryAddArgs is Option<String> (optional) but AC3 mandates it required and AC9 requires blank-url validation; (2) `handle_registry_add` output is a flat JSON object instead of `{ "registry": { id, url, priority, available }, "registry_changed" }` as specified in AC6; (3) `handle_registry_remove` uses key `"removed"` instead of `"removed_id"` per AC6; (4) sanitize_required field label is `"registry id"` instead of `"id"` per AC9. All four are straightforward fixes with no architectural changes needed.

evidence.description: skill_types.rs:37 — `pub(crate) url: Option<String>` should be `pub(crate) url: String`
ops_skill.rs:521-529 — add output is flat; spec requires nesting under `"registry"` key
ops_skill.rs:545-551 — remove output uses key `"removed"` instead of `"removed_id"`
ops_skill.rs:497,538 — sanitize_required label is `"registry id"` vs spec's `"id"` in both add and remove handlers
